record.field: CXC PROGRAMAS EPS, EPSS E IPS

select fbpl.id, aa.code, aa.name as cuenta, rp.ref, rp.name, fbpl.valor, fbpl.provision from fpa_cxc_programas_line fbpl left join account_account aa on aa.id = fbpl.account_id inner join fpa_cxc_programas fbp on fbp.id = fbpl.encabezado_id left join res_partner rp on rp.id = fbpl.partner_id WHERE fbp.user_id = %s AND fbp.company_id = %s AND fbpl.nivel in (%s) ORDER BY aa.code asc
